meta.name: ABILITY_ASSASSINATE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 50% crit chance.

A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 100% crit chance.

meta.name: ABILITY_BOOSTBACKSTAB_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage and ignore shield.
Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage, ignore shield, and inflict Bleed and Poison.

meta.name: ABILITY_POISONGAS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Poison 1 on all units adjacent to you.
Inflict Poison 2 on all units adjacent to you (even diagonally).

meta.name: ABILITY_POISONNAIL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison and ignores shield.
Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison and ignore shield.

Throw 2 nails that inflict Weakness and ignore shield.

Throw 2 nails that inflict Bleed and ignore shield.

meta.name: ABILITY_COINTOSS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Throw a coin that deals damage.
RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]

RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]

meta.desc_resolved: Refresh your movement action.

Refresh your movement action.

meta.desc_resolved: Refresh your basic attack.

meta.name: ABILITY_CAMOFLAUGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain Stealth.
Gain Stealth. Attacking while stealthed has a 100% critical hit chance.

meta.name: ABILITY_SHADOW_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Teleport behind a unit.
[s:.7]Nothin' personnel, kid.[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_TIMEWALK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Take an extra turn at the end of the round.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

Take an extra turn at the end of the round.

meta.name: ABILITY_DISTRACT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Make a unit face away from you.
Make any unit look away from you. This has a 33% chance to inflict Confusion.

meta.name: ABILITY_REBOUND_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles.
A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles. Deal damage to any unit you collide with.

meta.name: ABILITY_CUTPURSE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Throw a nail that knocks coins out of units it hits and ignores shield.
Throw 2 nails that knock coins out of units they hit and ignore shield.

meta.name: ABILITY_EAGLEEYE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn 2-3 coins on random tiles.
Spawn 3-7 coins on random tiles.

meta.name: ABILITY_PICKPOCKET_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Steal 1-3 coins from a unit and give it -1 Damage.
Steal 3-5 coins from a unit, give it -1 Damage, and apply some extra debuffs at random.

meta.name: ABILITY_BACKFLIP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy.

Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy.

meta.name: ABILITY_BLUR_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Gain +10% dodge chance.
Disable this spell if you have more than 65% dodge chance.

Gain +15% dodge chance. 
Disable this spell if you have more than 80% dodge chance.

meta.name: ABILITY_GREEDSTEP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport to a tile with coins on it.
Teleport to a tile with coins on it, then spawn 1-2 coins on random tiles.

meta.name: ABILITY_STALK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Target any unit. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Target any unit. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_NAILFLURRY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Throw 10 1-damage nails that ignore shield.
Throw 10 1-damage nails that ignore shield. Throw extra nails equal to your [img:dex].

meta.name: ABILITY_DECLAW_NAME

A 2-hit melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.

meta.name: ABILITY_QUICKROLL_NAME

Roll in a straight line up to three tiles.
RELOAD: Backstab a unit.

Roll in a straight or diagonal line up to five tiles.
